['Most commen crypto terms which we and all expert traders used 📌

Important for begginers/learners


✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#Altcoin'}, '
Any Crypto Currency other than bitcoin

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#BagHolder'}, '
A person who buys and hold coins in large quantity hoping to make good profits in the future.

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#BEAR'}, '/', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#BEARISH'}, '  Negative price movement

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#BTFD'}, ' 
Buy The Fucking Dip (an indication to buy a coin when it has dumped so hard)

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#BULL'}, '/', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#BULLISH'}, ' 
Positive price movement

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#DILDO'}, ' 
Long green or red candles

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#DUMP'}, '
To Sell off a coin

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#Dumping'}, '
Downward price movement

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#DYOR'}, '
Do Your Own Research

 ✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#FA'}, ' 
Fundamental Analysis

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#FOMO'}, ' 
Fear Of Missing Out (A coin is pumping and you get the feeling it’s gonna pump more, so you buy high)

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#FUD'}, '
 Fear Uncertainty & Doubt

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#HODL'}, '
 Hold/Hold a position

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#JOMO'}, ' 
Joy Of Missing Out

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#LONG'}, ' 
Margin Bull Position

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#MCAP'}, ' 
Market Capitalization

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#MOON'}, ' 
Continuous upward movement of price

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#OTC'}, ' 
Over The Counter

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#PUMP'}, ' 
Upward price movement

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#SAJ'}, ' ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#Candle'}, '
Huge green candle

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#SHITCOIN'}, ' 
A coin with no potential value or use

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#SHORT'}, ' 
Margin bear position

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#SWING'}, ' 
 Zig zag price movement ( Upwards & Downwards )

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#REKT'}, ' 
When you have a bad loss

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#TA'}, ' 
Technical Analysis

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#REVERSE'}, ' ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#INDICATOR'}, ' 
Someone who is always wrong predicting price movements.

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#RSI'}, ' 
Relative Strength Index

✔️ ', {'type': 'hashtag', 'text': '#WHALE'}, ' 
 Very Wealthy trader/Market mover.


Learn & Earn Session...

Have a good day']
